notes: Core Galaga mechanics are present (formation entry, diving, tractor beam, challenge stages, dual ship) but enemy sprites are minimal geometric shapes rather than authentic Galaga visuals, and the single-bullet-at-a-time limit combined with occasional collision/capture logic quirks reduces playability.

An incredibly impressive and complete implementation of Galaga, including the tractor beam capture/rescue mechanic, challenge stages, and accurate enemy formations, with only a minor bug where rescuing a ship mid-tractor-beam leaves the player at a higher Y-coordinate.

Solid stage flow and recognizable Galaga-inspired behavior are present, but edge-trigger handling is broken for Enter/shoot/pause so core interaction is significantly impaired despite otherwise stable rendering.
